command: cargo fmt --all --check; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cargo test --workspace --all-features; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; uv run --frozen ruff check .; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; uv run --frozen pyright; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; uv run --frozen pytest; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cargo xtask schema-check; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; uv run --frozen python -B scripts/check_docs.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; uv run --frozen python -B scripts/check_adrs.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; uv run --frozen python -B scripts/check_license.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; uv run --frozen python -B scripts/check_governance_ledgers.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; uv run --frozen python -B scripts/check_terminology.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; uv run --frozen python -B scripts/check_ci.py
